name: deletes_a_message_from_a_chat
description: Deletes a message, identified by its channel id and timestamp, from a slack channel, private group, or direct message conversation; the authenticated user or bot must be the original poster.

ts.description:
Timestamp of the message to be deleted. Must be the exact Slack message timestamp string with fractional precision, e.g., '1234567890.123456'.
Examples:
  "1234567890.123456"
  "1609459200.000000"

as_user.description: If `True`, deletes the message as the authenticated user using the `chat:write:user` scope. Bot users are considered authenticated users. If `False` or omitted, the message is deleted using the `chat:write:bot` scope.

channel.description:
The ID of the channel, private group, or direct message conversation containing the message to be deleted.
Examples:
  "C1234567890"
  "G0987654321"
  "D060123ABC"
